chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-3989 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16362/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 7 3. For order on Misc. No.16363/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 19.8.2025 Mr. Ashfaq Ahmed Shah Bukhari advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. This is a petition for quashment of FIR No.228/2025, registered under Sections 365-A, 506, 34 PPC readwith Section 7 of the ATA at Police Station Arambagh, Karachi. Learned counsel for the petitioner has not been able to make out a ground for quashment of the aforesaid FIR. The Investigating Officer of FIR No.228/2025, registered under Sections 365-A, 506, 34 PPC readwith Section 7 of the ATA at Police Station Arambagh, Karachi is directed to carry out the investigation impartially and strictly in accordance with law. A copy of this order shall be sent to the SSP, Karachi South, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
